testsuite.name: me.spring_webflax_rest.controllers.CategoryControllerTest

testcase.name: list()

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: Response body does not contain 3 elements expected:<3> but was:<2>

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Response body does not contain 3 elements expected:<3> but was:<2> at org.springframework.test.util.AssertionErrors.fail(AssertionErrors.java:61) at org.springframework.test.util.AssertionErrors.assertEquals(AssertionErrors.java:128) at org.springframework.test.web.reactive.server.DefaultWebTestClient$DefaultListBodySpec.lambda$hasSize$0(DefaultWebTestClient.java:615) at org.springframework.test.web.reactive.server.ExchangeResult.assertWithDiagnostics(ExchangeResult.java:232) at org.springframework.test.web.reactive.server.DefaultWebTestClient$DefaultListBodySpec.hasSize(DefaultWebTestClient.java:614) at me.spring_webflax_rest.controllers.CategoryControllerTest.list(CategoryControllerTest.java:53) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)
